channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: NIDC Celebrates Nigerian-American Engineer Over Braid-Assist Robot
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
NIDCOM celebrates Nigerian-American engineer Yinka Ogunbiyi for inventing HaloBraid, the world’s first braid-assist robot, raising $7M in funding.
Read More: https://punchng.com/nidc-celebrates-nigerian-american-engineer-over-braid-assist-robot/

item.title: I’m Osun central PDP candidate, chieftain counters lawmaker
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A PDP chieftain insists he is the authentic Osun PDP candidate for Osun Central Senatorial District, countering a lawmaker’s claim and warning against subs
Read More: https://punchng.com/im-osun-central-pdp-candidate-chieftain-counters-lawmaker/

item.title: Meet Team Nigeria athletes for Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Discover the athletes representing Team Nigeria at the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games. Get to know the Nigerian contingent aiming for medals in Scotland.
Read More: https://punchng.com/meet-team-nigeria-athletes-for-glasgow-2026-commonwealth-games/

item.title: Hamilton fastest as Ferrari dominate Hungarian GP practice
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton edged his team-mate Charles Leclerc to the fastest time in second practice as Ferrari dominated the first day of running at the Hungarian Grand Prix.

item.title: 2027: Grave not a witness box, Atiku accuses Obasanjo of using late Na’Abba for politics
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Atiku Abubakar accuses Olusegun Obasanjo of exploiting the late Ghali Na’Abba’s memory for 2027 political gain, calling his bribery allegations unfair and
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-grave-not-a-witness-box-atiku-accuses-obasanjo-of-using-late-naabba-for-politics/

item.title: Fury claims dominant seventh-round TKO victory vs Wach
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Tyson Fury claimed a seventh-round TKO over Mariusz Wach in Thailand on Friday as the British boxer took a step closer to his blockbuster bout against Anthony Joshua.

item.title: Rivers NBA election postponed as protest erupts over voters’ list
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Rivers NBA election has been indefinitely postponed after protests erupted over the voters’ list. Learn more about the crisis and security presence.
Read More: https://punchng.com/rivers-nba-election-postponed-as-protest-erupts-over-voters-list/

item.title: Delta gov rewards Spelling Bee world champion with N20m
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Delta State Governor, Sheriff Oborevwori, rewards Great Chinedu Okediachi with N20m for winning the World Spelling Bee Championship, highlighting the state
Read More: https://punchng.com/delta-gov-rewards-spelling-bee-world-champion-with-n20m/

item.title: LeBron signs for Philadelphia 76ers
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: LeBron ‌James has decided to join ‌the Philadelphia 76ers for his record-extending 24th NBA ‌season, the league's ‌all-time leading scorer said on Friday

item.title: PHOTOS: Wike celebrates daughter’s UK law degree with family dinner
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FCT Minister Nyesom Wike celebrates his daughter Jazmyne’s UK law degree from the University of Southampton with a family dinner. See photos from the event

item.description:
The NURTW rejects the Osun State government’s suspension of its activities, insisting the governor lacks the power to ban the union. A caretaker committee
Read More: https://punchng.com/nurtw-inaugurates-caretaker-committee-for-osun-chapter/

The Nigeria Governors’ Forum endorses President Tinubu’s approval for the Nigerian Army expansion, including four new divisions and 28,000 recruitments, to
Read More: https://punchng.com/ngf-backs-28000-military-recruitments-creation-of-four-new-army-divisions/

item.title: Uzodimma Not Speaking For Me Over Tinubu’s Re-Election, Says Otti
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Governor Alex Otti of Abia State has disagreed with the reported assertion of his Imo State counterpart, Hope Uzodimma, that the South East governors have resolved to work for the re-election of President Bola Tinubu in 2027, saying he is not aware of any such resolution. Fielding questions at the J

item.title: I want to transfer $17,000 in credit-card debt. Why did Wells Fargo offer me only a $4,000 credit limit?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I asked why the limit was so low, but they couldn’t give me an explanation.”

item.title: Nigerian-American Harvard grad builds world’s first braid-assist robot
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Nigerian-American Harvard trained engineer, Yinka Ogunbiyi has built HaloBraid, the world’s first braid-assist robot aiming to cut hours-long salon sessions down to minutes while reducing physical strain on professional stylists. According to her company, the device assists stylists by “

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Series Pre-Order Now Available on Konga
item.dc:creator: TechEconomy
item.description: Samsung has unveiled its most advanced foldable smartphone lineup yet, the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8. The tech conglomerate now sets a new benchmark for premium mobile innovation. Nigerian customers can now pre-order the new devices on Konga, Samsung’s trusted e-

item.title: Alleged Fraud: EFCC recovers N108m, pursues suspect who fled to UK
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has returned N108 million recovered from an alleged fraud case involving two former employees of a Lagos company.

item.title: Kaduna APC Crisis Brews As 55 Aspirants Allege Neglect, Marginalisation

item.description: A fresh crisis appears to be brewing within the Kaduna State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC), as no fewer than 55 party aspirants who voluntarily stepped down from various elective contests in the interest of party unity have accused the party leadership and the Kaduna S

item.title: Police arrest 6 Liberians for alleged abduction, human trafficking
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Police Command in Lagos State has detained six Liberians over alleged human trafficking, abduction and an international visa scam luring compatriots with fake relocation promises to Canada and the United Kingdom. The post Police arrest 6 Liberians for alleged abduction, human trafficking appeare

item.title: Zee Residence to open in Lekki, targets new standard in residential hospitality
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Zee Residence, a new boutique luxury residential hospitality destination, will officially open on Sunday in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos, with its promoters saying the facility is designed to redefine premium accommodation by combining the comfort of home with hotel-quality services.

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

item.title: BREAKING: Police arrest officers in viral video threatening to slap, detain motorist if he’s Igbo
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Ondo State Police Command has confirmed the arrest of officers captured in a viral video attempting to extort money from a motorist along Lagos –Benin Expressway. In the video, one of the officers said he would have slapped and detained the motorist if he was Igbo. The circulating footage of the

item.title: Commonwealth Games: Nworgu secures gold as Nigeria sweeps medals in Para Powerlifting
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Nworgu delivered a commanding performance to win Nigeria's first gold medal of the Games, lifting her way to a new Commonwealth Games record of 119.0 points in the women's lightweight para powerlifting event. The post Commonwealth Games: Nworgu secures gold as Nigeria sweeps medals in Para Powerlift

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Prof. Charles Anosike, Director General/CEO of the Nigerian Meteorological Agency (NiMet), has been recognised once again for his outstanding transformation of climate and weather services in Nigeria through various reforms, including operational digitalisation and others. The latest recognition cam

item.title: Defence minister slams Atiku over alleged US lobbying
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Minister of State for Defence, Bello Matawalle, has accused former Vice President Atiku Abubakar of attempting to internationalise Nigeria’s political contest, warning opposition politicians against actions that could undermine the country’s democratic institutions ahead of the 2027

item.title: Rodri Set To Undergo Back Surgery
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: World Cup winner Rodri will have surgery on a back issue on Monday, new Manchester City boss Enzo Maresca has confirmed. The 30-year-old Spain captain guided his country to World Cup glory last week and was named the Golden Ball winner as player of the tournament. But the midfielder’s last two

item.title: Six Liberians arrested for alleged abduction, human trafficking in Lagos
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: A police source said the syndicate lured victims from Liberia to Nigeria with promises of securing visas, work permits and residency documents for Canada and the UK, collecting huge sums of money for travel arrangements that never materialised.

item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: He promised to improve the welfare of doctors, strengthen unity within the association, and upgrade the NMA secretariat in Lafia. The post Meshi Emerges Chairman Of NMA Nasarawa, Pledges Improved Doctors’ Welfare appeared first on Channels Television.

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.description: American R&B singer, Nivea B. Hamilton, popularly known as Nivea, has revealed that she was diagnosed with leukemia earlier this year... The post R&B singer, Nivea, opens up on battle with leukemia appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Students are forging intergenerational bonds while planning game nights and teaching gym classes, but “by 7:30 or 8, things get pretty quiet here.”

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The suspected gang leader of the kidnapping syndicate that abducted a woman at a vegetable market along Airport Road in Benin City, Marvelous Isaac, has denied being a kidnapper, saying he is an electrician. DAILY POST reports that the suspect made the claim on Friday during his trial before Justice

item.title: Still waiting for the free $1,000 to hit your child’s ‘Trump account’? Here’s what to know.

item.description: The 30-year fixed-rate mortgage edged up to its highest level of 2026.

He made the call on Friday at the 2026 edition of Okota Festival held at the Palace Square, Arigidi-Akoko,

item.title: Kenya finalises crypto licencing framework for exchanges, digital asset firms
item.dc:creator: TechCabal
item.description: The regulations mark the final step in Kenya's effort to bring cryptocurrency businesses under formal regulatory oversight.

item.title: South African Court Halts Impeachment Proceedings Against Ramaphosa
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A South African court on Friday ruled in favour of President Cyril Ramaphosa’s bid to temporarily halt impeachment proceedings against him over a scandal involving more than half a million dollars allegedly hidden in a sofa at his Phala Phala ranch. Ramaphosa had asked the Western Cape High Court to

item.title: Russia’s Top Black Sea Oil Port Halts Loadings Amid Safety Fears
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The largest Russian oil port in the Black Sea paused tanker loadings over the past several days, amid a surge in Ukrainian drone attacks in the area.

item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The 17th edition of the Healing Streams Live Healing Services with Pastor Chris begins today, bringing together billions of participants worldwide for three days of worship, prayer, healing, and spiritual transformation.

item.title: Police Arrest Three Suspected Power Cables, Transformer Components Vandals In Yobe

item.description: Obasanjo also rejected Osoba’s account of events surrounding the attempted impeachment of then Speaker of the House of Representatives, Ghali Na’Abba, The post Police Arrest Three Suspected Power Cables, Transformer Components Vandals In Yobe appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Promo Targets 2m Consumers As Prize Winners In 3 Months
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: More than two million consumers across Nigeria stand to win prizes in a new nationwide promotion by Nestlé Nigeria that will run from July to September 2026. The campaign, announced by MILO, Nestlé Nigeria, will award airtime, cash prizes, and six vehicles through a ‘Text & Win’ mech

item.title: Freight Distress Report: Supply chain providers cut more than 1,200 jobs

item.title: Cathie Wood Adds $50 Million Of Tesla Stock After 15% Drop

item.title: Spotify releases Asake’s ‘M$NEY’ concert film
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The film captured Asake’s landmark one-night-only performance of his chart-topping album at the historic Theatre Royal Drury Lane in London.

item.title: Kogi landmass is bigger than entire South-East — Fanwo
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Kogi State Commissioner for Information and Communications, Kingsley Fanwo, has said the state's expansive landmass presents The post Kogi landmass is bigger than entire South-East — Fanwo appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Siya Kolisi’s Leadership Arc and the New Shape of Springbok Influence
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Kolisi’s background has become part of South African sporting memory. Born in Zwide, Gqeberha, he moved through a childhood shaped by hardship before rugby opened a route into elite schools, provincial structures and eventually the national team. That journey is powerful because it connects directly
